notes: SFTP is a file-transfer protocol with no vendor REST API, so this OpenAPI document is synthesized from the adaptor surface (ast.json). All five public operations are modelled as POST paths: list, getCSV, putCSV, getJSON, normalizeCSVarray. Request bodies carry operation arguments (paths, encoding, parsing options); responses reflect return shapes (directory listing / FileEntry, parsed CSV rows, JSON file content, upload result). filter/callback arguments are runtime functions and are omitted from request schemas. normalizeCSVarray is a local data transform (no network call) included for completeness. Server URL is a mock placeholder.
